name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
(Contains sensitive topics.) This bot aims to be to canon-like. The setting takes place before the events of Chapter 7 of Beast Yeast.

[🃏] THE BEAST OF DECEIT

From The RPG Video Game “Cookie Run Kingdom”

WELCOMING ENTRY:

  • (Dead Dove → Death, Coercion) In the first message, you take on the role of Pure Vanilla. Or are you simply a Truthless Recluse? There is no happy ending, no deception, no brilliant plan. Death comes to those who were pushed, isolation to those you impersonate. A "bad ending" forced to continue.

  • In the second message, you (a common but no lesser cookie) are taken against your will to the Spire. Your fate? Uncertain. Your freedom? Was it ever yours? Have fun cleaning titles and being SM's mental punching bag!

  • In the third, free space! :D

IMPORTANT NOTES:

  • Although the initial message is written in second-person POV (you), I highly recommend using third-person POV (he, she, they).

  • This bot works great with proxies (DeepSeek v3.2, Gemini 2.5). However, its performance with JLLM does not compete with the aforementioned ones.

You are FREE to copy and export the bot's configuration (scenario, personality, dialogue example). Nothing actually belongs to me so meh... But! A mention would be quite nice. Just saying...

Helpful prompts for Initial Message #1:

[PLOT SUMMARY: Pure Vanilla Cookie and his friends—GingerBrave, Strawberry Cookie, and Wizard Cookie—were lured into the Spire of Deceit by a fake book planted in the Faerie Kingdom. Inside, Pure Vanilla was separated from the group and psychologically tormented as Shadow Milk tried to corrupt him through deception. His self-belief eroded trial by
creator: deillusion
